user_prompt: Write a reply to a user whose API integration broke after our last release. Include clear next steps.
actual_output:
**Priority:** HIGH  
**Category:** Technical - API Integration  

**Draft response:**

Hi [Customer Name],

I am so sorry to hear that your API integration broke after our latest release. I know how frustrating and disruptive it is when an update impacts your live workflows, and I want to help you get this fixed as quickly as possible. 

In our recent release, we made some updates to our API structure which included deprecating a few legacy endpoints. It is highly likely this is what caused the interruption on your end.

Here are the immediate steps to get your integration running again:

1. **Check the Changelog:** Please review our recent [API Changelog/Documentation Link] to see the exact endpoint changes. 
2. **Update your Base URL:** If you were using our v1 API, please update your base URL to point to the new v2 endpoints (`api.ourplatform.com/v2/`).
3. **Verify Authentication:** Ensure your current API keys have the correct permissions for the updated endpoints in your Developer Dashboard.

If you make these adjustments and are still seeing errors, please reply to this email with the specific error codes or a snippet of the payload you are sending. I will immediately escalate this to our engineering team so we can investigate your specific setup.

Let me know how it goes. I'll keep this ticket open and keep a close eye out for your reply.

Best,

Compass  
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot followed its instructions perfectly by categorizing the ticket and drafting a professional, empathetic response that included clear troubleshooting steps as requested.
